notes: Vineyard (v6d) is a CNCF sandbox project — an in-memory immutable data manager giving zero-copy sharing of distributed data between steps of big-data and ML pipelines. Despite the spelling it is VIN-yerd, with a short i and a silent e; it is not VINE-yard. Dictionaries are unanimous on /ˈvɪnjərd/, and the project site offers no alternative pronunciation of its own.
